narrative:
Blue Ash 5-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,090 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.9 percentage points.
